testcase.name: test_no_same_image_across_different_colours[Vitra]

testcase.name: test_no_same_image_across_different_colours[Grohe]

failure.message: Failed: Grohe: 1 families have the SAME image shared across DIFFERENT colours: - family=grohe:thermostat:grohtherm-smartcontrol-thermostat-square-3-control colours=['code 6gl0', 'code 6gn0'] image=https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/grohe/grohe-thermostat-grohtherm-smartcontrol-thermostat-square-3-control/supplier/hero-02799ba81a4c.jpg

testcase.name: test_vitra_memoria_family

failure.message: AssertionError: Duplicate hero images across distinct-colour Vitra Memoria variants: [('matt black', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-9ecbc6a59940.jpg'), ('matt taupe /sand beige', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-cd8b0bd60ba2.jpg'), ('matt white', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-a05d12e5b9e6.jpg'), ('white', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-a05d12e5b9e6.jpg')] assert 3 == 4 + where 3 = len({'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-9ecbc6a59940.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-a05d12e5b9e6.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-cd8b0bd60ba2.jpg'}) + where {'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-9ecbc6a59940.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-a05d12e5b9e6.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-cd8b0bd60ba2.jpg'} = set(['https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-9ecbc6a59940.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-cd8b0bd60ba2.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-a05d12e5b9e6.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-a05d12e5b9e6.jpg']) + and 4 = len(['https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-9ecbc6a59940.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-cd8b0bd60ba2.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-a05d12e5b9e6.jpg', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-a05d12e5b9e6.jpg'])

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_catalog_variant_image_contamination.py:138: in test_vitra_memoria_family assert len(set(images)) == len(images), ( E AssertionError: Duplicate hero images across distinct-colour Vitra Memoria variants: [('matt black', 'https://vburaxruvbnbahegtbya.supabase.co/storage/v1/object/public/forge-products/vitra/vitra-csw-memoria-rim-ex-wc/supplier/hero-9ecbc6a59940.jpg'), ('matt taupe /sand beige',
